description_long: This is a modern rifle with a distinctive, colorful, graffiti-inspired finish covering its entire exterior. The rifle features a long, slender barrel with a flash hider at the muzzle, a fixed skeletonized stock, and a pistol grip. The magazine is curved and detachable, matching the vibrant, multi-colored pattern seen on the rest of the weapon. Iron sights are present on the top rail, and the handguard and receiver are both decorated with intricate, urban-style graphics. The overall design suggests a blend of functionality and urban street art, making it visually striking and unique.
description: A modern rifle with a graffiti-style, multi-colored finish, fixed skeletonized stock, and curved detachable magazine.
description_view_0: The rifle is seen from the front, showing the muzzle and flash hider, with the barrel and iron sight aligned centrally.
description_view_1: The left side view displays the full length of the rifle, highlighting the colorful graphics, curved magazine, and skeletonized stock.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back of the stock and the alignment of the receiver, with the barrel extending away.
description_view_3: The right side view mirrors the left, revealing the same vibrant finish, magazine, and stock details.
